clusters.justification: These concepts reliably co-activate within limbic and paralimbic networks responsible for processing generalized emotional salience, arousal, and mood states.
These terms reflect the computation of utility and goal-directed drive, sharing robust neuroimaging co-activation across mesolimbic dopamine pathways and the ventromedial prefrontal cortex.

Covering both internal self-referential thought and interpersonal projections like theory of mind, these concepts consistently evoke the cortical midline and temporoparietal topography of the default mode network.
